title: GeoPulse 1.29.0
highlights: Added city/country normalization on Reverse Geocoding page
Added more achievements related to trains/flights
Add short trips between Stays even if they do not satisfy min requirements
Do not re-center Friend Live map when you moved to other place
Added Open in Google Maps button on Friend Live tooltip
Fixed styles on Timeline reports page on mobile
Upgraded backend framework/libraries to the latest stable versions
